records.title: Better sleep starts with the right pillow for light sleepers
records.description: The Slumberdown British Wool Pillow uses natural fibres that regulate temperature and reduce disturbance — giving light sleepers a calmer, more settled night.

records.title: Light sleeper? Natural wool might be what's missing
records.description: Light sleepers often wake from minor discomfort or temperature changes. British wool naturally adjusts to body heat and supports restful, undisturbed sleep.

records.title: Waking for no reason? Your pillow could be the cause
records.description: Poor pillow support disrupts sleep more than most people realise. The Slumberdown British Wool Pillow gives light sleepers consistent support through the night.

records.title: A natural pillow for anxious sleepers who need comfort
records.description: British wool is naturally soft and breathable — the Slumberdown Wool Pillow creates a calm, comfortable sleep environment for those who struggle to switch off.

records.title: Can't switch off at night? Natural sleep products help
records.description: Anxiety-driven sleep problems often respond well to natural materials. The Slumberdown British Wool Pillow is soft, breathable, and gentle — no synthetics.

records.title: Natural fibres for anxious sleepers: Slumberdown Wool Pillow
records.description: Made from British wool, this pillow is free from synthetic fills — ideal for anxious sleepers who sleep better with natural, breathable bedding next to them.

records.title: Better nights for restless sleepers: Slumberdown Wool Pillow
records.description: The Slumberdown British Wool Pillow adapts to movement and maintains consistent support — helping restless sleepers find a comfortable position and stay there.

records.title: Restless at night? Your pillow support might be the issue
records.description: Frequent shifting often comes down to pillow discomfort. British wool adapts to how you sleep and holds its shape — giving restless sleepers fewer reasons to move.

records.title: Toss and turn all night? A supportive pillow makes a difference
records.description: The Slumberdown British Wool Pillow provides natural support that stays consistent through movement. If you're a restless sleeper, the material matters.
